items.title: After shocking quarter, IBM insists that AI isn't killing the mainframe
items.summary: After IBM's stock crashed last week on warnings of poor mainframe sales, the CEO explained that AI wrecked corporate hardware budget, temporarily.

items.title: Apple updates macOS 28 guidance with direct encrypted HFS+ to APFS conversion
items.summary: Users who rely on encrypted HFS+ drives will no longer need to decrypt them before converting them to APFS for macOS 28 compatibility. Here's what that means.

items.title: Google justifies its massive AI spending with a booming cloud business
items.summary: Google's cloud business is thriving, as companies adopting its AI and AI infrastructure services help the tech giant to report record profits.

items.title: Jensen Huang argues American companies should be allowed to use Chinese AI models - Nvidia CEO says backdoors connected to China are misconceptions
items.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang raised several points against the rising sentiment in Washington that U.S. firms should be prevented from accessing Chinese AI models. He also advocates for open models, which he says makes AI more secure.

items.title: What Type of Bluetooth Beacon Does Cisco Spaces Use?
